chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2010 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7480/2024 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 17.04.2025 On 21.03.2025, the following order was passed;- “None present nor any intimation receives. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Under the circumstances this petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution, however, in the interest of justice adjourned to 17.04.2025 with intimation notice to counsel for the petitioner.” Today neither petitioner nor his Counsel has appeared to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel prima-facie suggests that they are no more interested to proceed with this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
